_readme: Supplier system-of-record export served over public HTTPS. The FDC Web2Json attestation reads THIS document; FakturaHub decodes the attested facts on-chain. documentSha256 = sha256 of the `document` string (verify: printf %s "$document" | shasum -a 256).
